title: Vine boom sound effects(Passive mobs)
description: A texture pack that changes all sound effects of passive mobs to the vine boom sfx
body:
This resource pack thanges the following mobs'sound to the vine boom sound effect:
- Allay
- Armadillo
- Axolotl
- Bat
- Camel
- Cat
- Chicken
- Cod
- Cow
- Donkey
- Fox
- Frog
- Glow Squid
- Horse
- Mooshroom
- Mule
- Ocelot
- Parrot
- Pig
- Pufferfish
- Rabbit
- Salmon
- Sheep
- Skeleton Horse
- Sniffer
- Snow Golem
- Squid
- Strider
- Tadpole
- Tropical Fish
- Turtle
- Villager
- Wandering Trader
